arts.ttl: Nedim Bajrami finds no Rangers respite with Albania as scathing verdict from England flop sums up struggles
arts.sum: The midfielder has copped some serious flak for his anonymous display against Thomas Tuchel's men at Wembley

arts.ttl: Newcastle’s Anthony Gordon withdraws from England squad with injury
arts.sum: Gordon hurt in win over Albania and misses Latvia game Tuchel says hip problem is a worry for Newcastle player Injury has forced Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon to pull out of England’s squad for their World Cup qualifier against Latvia. The 24-year-old came off the bench late in Friday’s 2-0 win over Albania but sustained a hip problem late in the game that saw him limp off down the tunnel at the final whistle. Gordon underwent a scan on Saturday and has been sent back to Newcastle to begin treatment. No timescale has yet been put on the injury but Thomas Tuchel admitted it was a concern for the winger. More to follow Continue reading...

arts.ttl: England 22-year-old could make full debut against Latvia as Anthony Gordon withdraws from Thomas Tuchel's squad
arts.sum: England announce that Anthony Gordon has withdrawn from the Three Lions' camp ahead of Monday's clash with Latvia due to injury.

arts.ttl: Gordon withdraws from England squad after hip injury
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon withdraws from the England squad for Monday's World Cup qualifier against Latvia because of a hip injury.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon forced to pull out of England squad with hip problem
arts.sum: The Newcastle winger was injured after coming on as a substitute against Albania and had a scan on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon injury: Newcastle out of England squad as FA issue new update on ‘worrying’ hip issue
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel admitted the injury Gordon suffered against Albania at Wembley on Friday did ‘not look good’

arts.ttl: BREAKING: England star immediately withdraws from squad after 'worrying' Thomas Tuchel update
arts.sum: England have lost Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon in the build-up to their World Cup qualifier against Latvia on Monday night due to an injury picked up vs Albania
England’s defensive hierarchy has been turned on its head by a 6ft 7in Geordie.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden warned over England futures after Thomas Tuchel blast
arts.sum: England wide men Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden struggled to make an impact in the World Cup qualifying opener against Albania and questions have been asked about the pair

arts.ttl: Tuchel happy with start but England must be 'more dangerous'
arts.sum: New England head coach Thomas Tuchel says he is happy with his side's 2-0 win over Albania in his first game in charge but that they must be "more dangerous".
